name: Murphy Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crispy. Remove from heat and drain on paper towels.
2. Add the stewed tomatoes to the pan with the cooked bacon fat. Stir in the Velveeta cheese pieces.
3. Melt the cheese by stirring constantly over low heat until fully melted.
4. Transfer the mixture into a greased rectangle baking dish.
5. Sprinkle the remaining Velveeta cheese slices on top of the casserole.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes, or until the cheese has melted completely.
7. Serve hot with dinner rolls and salad.
